subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a servant of Thy servants who hath been nurtured from the breast of Thy guidance, and hath taken shelter beneath the shade of Thy tender care, and hath remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد من عبادک قد رضع من ثدی هدایتک و استظل فی ظل عنایتک و تذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
